          Babel

          Temptation of Jesus

          Betrayal of Christ

          Ascension of Christ

          Fall of Satan

          3.5 years

          First Resurrection

          1,000 Years

          Intermediate

          7 Years+

          The devil, through the serpent, deceived the woman and brought death into the world.

          Cherub
          Serpent
          The Woman
          Adam

          The devil was put in charge of death. Held the territory outside Eden, ”

          Cherub
          Death
          Sin
          Cain

          Babel and the Division of Nations.

          The sons of God who join with Satan are set over the nations.

          Satan crushed under the feet of Christ (and the Church)

          The sons of Elohim over the nations lending support to Satan, “the Wicked” [Psa 82:]

          		 Lake of Fire

          The gods

          Tempted Jesus the Son

          Satan
          The Son

          “Sinners enticing the Son to join with them”[Pro 1]

          Satan (as a power in the heavens) captured and put in prison.

          Satan (a power in the heavens) punished

          The powers in the heavens and the rulers on earth captured and put in prison to be punished after many days.

          The powers in the heavens punished after many days.


          Cherub

          Gog of Magog

          Gog of Magog
          Mount of God

          Driven from the mount of GOD [Eze 28:16].

          Driven to the earth [Eze 28:17]

          Satan plundering nations [Hab 2:8]


          Saints


          Satan, through Herod, tried to kill Jesus shortly after birth

          Tempted Jesus in the wilderness

          Satan cast out of heaven like lightening

          Satan and the princes conspire to kill Jesus, the Son of God, so that the inheritance may remain theirs.

          “I saw Satan fall from heaven like lightning”

          In the Truth

          Left the Truth [Joh 8]

          Lied and Murdered

          Prince of this World

          Cast out of Heaven

          Entered into Judas Iscariot and he betrays Jesus

          Satan
          Judas Ischariot

          Killed the Christ through Pontus Pilate and the Jews

          Pontius Pilate

          Christ in heaven

          Christ

          He did not remain in the Truth [Joh 8]

          Christ drawing all men to himself (through the preaching of the Gospel)


          The Dragon

          The man-child caught to Heaven and to the Throne of God

          The Dragon
          Michael


          Beast
          The Dragon

          Makes war against the saints (i.e., Israel)

          		 Abyss

          Captured and Thrown into the Abyss (i.e., the bottomless pit)

          Satan released from the Abyss

          Gathers Gog against Jerusalem

          Satan cast into the Lake of Fire

          Satan accusing the brethren

          The Dragon

          Death is Destroyed

          Death

          Men from every tribe and language and people and nation are bought for God through the gospel and the blood of the Lamb [Rev 5:9-10; 12:11]

          Details

          Time:

          Location/Region:

          Characters/Actors

          The Creation of Satan

          1. Ordained as a Guardian Cherub [Eze 28:14]
          2. Blameless [Eze 28:15]
          3. Perfect in beauty, wise [Eze 28:12,15,17]
          4. In Eden [Eze 28:13]
          5. On the Holy Mount of God, Walking among "the stones of fire”[Eze 28:14]

          Temptation of Man

          (Since he is the Father of Lies, it is he who moved the serpent to lie.)

          The Power Behind the Curse

          “…the one who holds the power of death, that is, the devil” [Heb 2:14]

          Sin is at the door. It desires to have you, but you must master it.”[Gen 4:6-7]

          Cast Out of Heaven

          Cast out of Heaven to the Earth by Michael and his angels [Rev 12]

          Man-Child

          The dragon tried to kill the man-child born to the Woman (Israel/Jerusalem) [Rev 12]

          Rise of the Beast

          The Dragon raises the Beast (aka. Antichrist) [Rev 13]. The dragon gives the Beast

          1. His throne
          2. Great authority over (every tribe and language and people and nations)

          Gog of Magog

          1. Evil thoughts enter into the heart of Gog
          2. Gog of Magog gathers many nations and attacks Jerusalem and the towns and villages of Israel

          Gog's End

          Reduced to ash and made a spectacle for all [Eze 28:18]
          Comes to a horrible end never to be again [Eze 28:19].

          Sons of God Destroyed

          The sinful sons of Elohim are cast in the Lake of Fire and “die like men”! [Psa 82:6]

          Satan Becomes a Victim

          Saints rise from the dead and Satan becomes their victim

          Will not your debtors suddenly arise? Will they not wake up and make you tremble? Then you will become their victim. [Hab 2:7]
